title: Customer
description: A Customer represents a consumer of the service or product that the business offers. Customers can be organized as sub-customers (jobs) within a parent customer hierarchy.

Title.description: Title of the person (e.g., Mr., Mrs., Ms.)

Suffix.description: Suffix of the person (e.g., Jr., Sr., III)

DisplayName.description: The name displayed to identify the customer. Must be unique across Customer, Employee, and Vendor objects.

CompanyName.description: The name of the company associated with the customer

PrintOnCheckName.description: Name of the customer as printed on a check

Active.description: Whether the customer is currently active

Job.description: Whether this customer is a sub-customer (job)

Level.description: Depth level in the customer hierarchy (0 = top)

FullyQualifiedName.description: Fully qualified name of the entity, including parent names separated by colons

Balance.description: Open balance amount for the customer

BalanceWithJobs.description: Open balance amount including balances of sub-customers (jobs)
